creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
If possible, src/test/getdns_query should be build and installed.

It's part of getdns and a useful tool, see

https://www.nanog.org/sites/default/files/3_stubby-nanog68.pdf

Btw, cd work/getdns-0.9.0/src/test && make builds getdns_query.

And: If the binary is called without arguments, it dumps a core after
printing lots of diags.
